name: Cloudmersive Natural Language Processing API
description: NLP API v2 providing sentiment analysis, profanity detection, hate speech detection, subjectivity analysis, text similarity, entity extraction, language detection, translation, parsing, part-of-speech tagging, rephrasing, segmentation, and spell checking.
